Board direction not explicitly stated as right (only surfer riding right)
judgments.justification: Solid two-person description with brown hair and watercolor style. Misses the blue-purple wetsuit hue specificity.

judgments.justification: Strong description that notably captures the blue-purple wetsuit color. Misses hair color and explicit board direction.

key_hits: Dark navy blue or purple long-sleeve wetsuit for observer
key_misses: Says surfer inside the tube/curl which is slightly inaccurate
hallucinations: Says surfer is 'inside the tube of the wave' - slightly overstated
judgments.justification: Good two-person description with correct wetsuit hue. Minor overstatement on tube position. Misses hair color.

Dark blue or deep purple top for observer
key_misses: Mountains described as singular rather than range; less specific about purple hue
judgments.justification: Correctly identifies two figures but less detailed than larger Gemma variants. Misses hair and board direction.

key_hits: Dark purple or dark blue wetsuit for observer
judgments.justification: Excellent concise description hitting brown hair, blue-purple wetsuit, purple mountains, and two-person count. Only misses explicit board direction.

judgments.justification: Captures two people and watercolor style but has internal contradiction about 'lone surfer' and misses hair color.

key_misses: Wetsuit described as dark blue/black, not explicitly blue-purple
judgments.justification: Excellent two-person identification with explicit count, brown hair, and watercolor style. Strong across most criteria.

judgments.justification: Correct two-person count with good style description. Adds unverifiable age speculation.

key_misses: Wetsuit color generic dark, not blue-purple
judgments.justification: Clean two-person description with watercolor style and purple mountains. Misses hair color and wetsuit hue specifics.

key_misses: Wetsuit described as dark, not explicitly blue-purple
judgments.justification: Strong description with explicit brown hair, two-person count, and watercolor style. Well-organized and accurate.

judgments.justification: Excellent description with two-person count, brown hair, purple/dark blue wetsuit hue, and purple mountains. Most details accurate.

key_misses: Wetsuit color generic dark, not blue-purple

Says surfer wears 'shorty or sleeveless top' - speculative

judgments.justification: Good two-person description with brown hair and purple mountains. Adds speculative detail about surfer's wetsuit type.

key_misses: Wetsuit color generic dark, not blue-purple
Board direction not explicitly stated (says surfer on right side of frame)
Doesn't explicitly state two - says 'spectator' and 'surfer'
judgments.justification: Strong description with explicit brown hair and watercolor technique. Two figures clearly identified though not numbered.

notes: All 15 models correctly identified two people in the image - no surfer-count failures on this image. The strongest differentiators were: (1) explicitly stating brown hair for the foreground observer (glm-4.6v-flash-9b, qwen3-vl-8b, qwen3.5-9b both variants, qwen3.6-27b nothink, qwen3.6-35b-a3b both variants), (2) recognizing the blue-purple wetsuit hue (gemma4-26b-a4b, gemma4-31b, glm-4.6v-flash-9b, qwen3.6-27b nothink). No model explicitly stated the surfboard points to the right. Several models added minor hallucinations: qwen3-vl-4b had an internal contradiction ('lone surfer' vs observer), qwen3.5-4b nothink speculated about age, qwen3.6-27b nothink claimed twilight setting and mislabeled wetsuit as shirt, qwen3.6-35b-a3b nothink speculated about sleeveless top. Smaller models (gemma4-e4b, qwen3-vl-4b) and qwen3.6-27b think were less detailed overall. The image was well-handled across the board, suggesting surf scene with observer is a relatively easy motif.
